title: Geode+
description: A Mod that add geodes to Minecraft Overworld, Nether and even The End!
body:
![GeodePlus](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/logo-for-geode-plus.png?raw=true) --- 🖥️ Need a server? Check out BisectHosting! ---

About The Mod

A mod that add geodes to Minecraft Overworld, Nether and even The End by Team Chorus!

--- ### Geodes ###### OverWorld - Can be found any OverWorld Biomes
Lapis ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/lapisGeodeInMineshaft.png?raw=true)
Redstone ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/redstoneGeodeInLushCave.png?raw=true)
Emerald ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/emeraldGeodeInLushCave.png?raw=true)
Diamond ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/diamondGeodeInLushCave.png?raw=true)
###### Rare Geodes
Celestite - Can be found in Mangrove Swamp & Swamp ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/celestiteGeode.png?raw=true)
Pink Topaz - Can be found in Cherry Grove ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/pinkTopazGeode.png?raw=true)
Prismarine - Can be found in Deep Oceans ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/prismarineGeode.png?raw=true)
Echo - Can be found in Deep Dark ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/echoGeode.png?raw=true)
###### Nether - Can be found in any Nether Biomes
Gold Nugget ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/goldNuggetGeode.png?raw=true)
Glowstone ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/glowstoneGeode.png?raw=true)
Quartz ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/quartzGeode.png?raw=true)
Ancient Debris ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/ancientDebrisGeode.png?raw=true)
###### The End
Wrappist - Can be found in End Highlands, Midlands ![Geode](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/blob/master/page/screenshot/wrappistGeodeUnderEndIsland.png?raw=true)

### Faq - Q. Can I port this Geode+ to Bedrock? - A. No - Q. Where can I report the issue? - A. Please report the issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/ChorusTeam/geode-plus/issues) - Q. More Questions? - Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/PUJ42rkRBY) for more helps about the Mod! --- ### Credit: Contributor: - Mr.Brose - Geode Plus Title Logo - BottomTextCf28 - Textures - squizzle_dizzle - Textures - sonic3xn - Textures - itsmineblock11 (Architecture Loader) - orcinus73 - Large Crystal Generation [product-screenshot]: logo-for-geode-plus.png
